feed.title: AO3 - Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Gotham is the worst
entry.summary:
Author: Frey_S

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,572Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 915

Summary: On top of Hal's list of things he hates are three things: charity galas, Gotham and Batman. So of course he ends up dealing with all of those in one night, even if he doesn't technically know he ends up sleeping with that last one. He's never letting Carol drag him to rich people events ever again. In which Hal dates Bruce Wayne. Tells him he's Green Lantern. Breaks up with him. And then sort of dates Batman without knowing that he is in fact sleeping with Bruce Wayne again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Changing Genre… Romance Isekai!!!
entry.summary:
Author: RegretsEverything

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,502Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 50

Summary: Hal groans. "No way!! Why am I the third love interest?? Like, not even the second?!" "Shut it." Bruce's left eye twitches as he looks at his status window. "At least you aren't described like a Dark Romance love interest." Hal whistles, glancing at what Bruce was looking at. "Yikes… Everyone wants the cold duke of the north, but no one wants to be him." "Hey! At least you don't have to fake not being an orphan, since even here, you're parentless." Hal shrugs, patting Bruce's shoulder. Bruce gives him a look. "I hope you get killed in the war with the Demon King." ------ Or Hal and Bruce accidentally need to get isekai'd into a dating sim as the second and third love interests, who are supposed to hate each other (something that's not that difficult to replicate). The only way back home is for the Main Character to fall in love and finish the game. While dodging bad endings, death flags, conspiracies, and clichés, Hal and Bruce start feeling something more than their usual annoyance with each other. Introducing!! The Playful Cocky Master of the Mage Tower, Hal Jordan x The Broody Cold Duke of The North, Bruce Wayne.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: [Podfic] Maritime Hostile Takeover
entry.summary:
Author: Brovotics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 130Chapters: 5/28Kudos: 16

Summary: [Current Length: 1:54:52] The colony of seals didn’t usually bother Hal whenever he was working, so he paid them no mind unless he was trying to get one to move out his way. How was he supposed to know that finding one of their pelts would trigger a whole-ass situation he was totally unqualified to deal with?

entry.title: Panalangin (Prayer) by Apo Hiking Society
entry.summary:
Author: PumpkinWritesFandom

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,552Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 78

Summary: Hal was angry about many things today: an alien invasion happening while breakfast-in-bed rituals were being enjoyed, Bruce knowing his Lantern ring's size like the freak that he is, and the fact that all of this was happening while he was wearing pink flannel pajamas under his uniform, and his breath still smelled like barely-10-second mouthwash about 2-hours into the fighting and the rescuing.Bruce apparently think it's the most romantic thing they could be doing......that fucking loser.

entry.title: The Friendship Lantern
entry.summary:
Author: piecesofmoon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,055Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 54

Summary: Hal gave Bruce a friendship lantern for his birthday. Some say that once the novelty and ardour fade, the bedrock of love is friendship; others claim that romance eventually settles into the quiet kinship of family. But I’ve always been drawn to the insanity of falling in love.

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,834Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 750

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Me and My Husband by Mitski
entry.summary:
Author: PumpkinWritesFandom

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,132Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 79

Summary: Hal has become many things - a son, a soldier, a pilot, a hero, a galactic tyrant, the best lantern that will have ever lived, the worst teammate to have in a crisis, a partner, a 𝘱𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘯𝘦𝘳. Hal's body and identity have repeatedly adapted to all the world had ever asked of him But to Bruce, there is no performance to perfect, no crowd to please, no law to follow. If only Hal would see that...

entry.title: Lifetime by Ben&Ben
entry.summary:
Author: PumpkinWritesFandom

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,126Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 44

Summary: Hal had two lifetimes: the one before fear had poisoned every aspect of his existence, and the one after. Now, he reckons with the consequences of his own human susceptibility to fear and terror, and we are all left to wonder what that hope might be for.

entry.title: live on in your eyes and not your mind
entry.summary:
Author: HC_Carter12

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,212Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 92

Summary: Despite what Clark seemed to think, Bruce was not nervous. Bruce was not only the third richest man in the world, a competent businessman and a father of seven. He was the goddamn Batman. Batman didn’t get nervous. “I’m just saying it would make sense if you were nervous about today,” said Clark, ignoring Bruce’s glare. “It’s not every day you have to interview your dead mom- who it turns out hasn’t been dead in years- because she magically mentored a former friend while he was dead, because now that friend has come back to life as well.” Bruce felt his eye begin to twitch behind the cowl’s lens. “Shut up, Clark.”   Hal Jordan was brought back to life, which would be great if it didn't involve Martha Wayne also being alive and Bruce not knowing a thing about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Down The Pipe
entry.summary:
Author: Cheshire_Cafe

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,874Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 184

Summary: Bruce raises an eyebrow. “So you want money?” “Nah, just wanted you to feel guilty.” “Right. And you called me childish.” “Never said I wasn’t,”  he says, sporting a grin that screams in and of itself, childish. “You deny it. All the time.” Hal throws his hands up in a ‘what can I say?’ gesture. “A man needs pride and dignity, Bruce. Pride and dignity.” Bruce hums. “Must suck that you have neither, then.” The scowl he receives in return is worth it. Bruce sighs again. “I’ll send you a check.”

entry.title: Rules of Attraction
entry.summary:
Author: sweetmessyfriend

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,517Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 98

Summary: Hal Jordan has seventy-three dollars in his account, a beaten up Tiguan, and a lifetime of guilt he's still trying to outrun. Bruce Wayne has a house with too many empty rooms and a wedding band he never got to return. When they cross paths at a Gotham hotel bar, Bruce makes Hal an offer: a room, a bed, a place to land. It's supposed to be simple. Two people with history, a temporary arrangement, no reason to complicate things. But old habits die hard and neither of them has ever been good at being honest.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: They Started It!!! (A Story On How to Piss Off Five Children and Seduce Their Father by Hal Jordan)
entry.summary:
Author: RegretsEverything

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,467Chapters: 8/15Kudos: 1,001

Summary: “My dad says adult bodies can’t survive on Red Bull and cereal alone. Do you even know how to cook rice, Mr. Jordan? Is your tummy okay?” Hal Jordan’s stomach is fine. His pride is not. For reasons known only to the universe at large, the Wayne kids have decided that bullying Hal is their newest hobby. In their under-twelve years of wisdom, they’ve concluded he is too single, too lonely, and way too funny when flustered. Hal tries to ignore them… until one day he snaps and fires back the pettiest way possible: He starts flirting with their dad. ----------------- Or Hal has beef with literal preschoolers as a literal adult man. The Wayne kids bully a full ass adult because he is an easy target and gives top tier reactions. Then they completely lose their minds when Hal turns around and seduces their dad. ----------------- No powers au. Neighbors au. Bruce isn't Batman. Hal isn't Green Lantern. The batkids are still menaces, though.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne
  • Cassandra Cain & Tim Drake & Dick Grayson & Jason Todd & Bruce Wayne & Damian Wayne
  • Batfamily Members & Alfred Pennyworth

entry.title: lovers on the ropes
entry.summary:
Author: catamino

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,355Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 102

Summary: Friends with benefits but the benefits are neverending mental torment and actually you're not really friends either.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: don't go in there, you'll become one
entry.summary:
Author: victini_cresoon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,974Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Really, Bruce should have expected it to happen eventually. Trapped in an alternate universe, stuck in a body much younger than he was before having his soul dragged somewhere it did not belong, he falls head first into the lives of gods, monsters, magic, and everything inbetween. Quite frankly, he just wants to go home to his family, glowstick of a boyfriend, and most importantly his dog. Too bad souls from his world have started leaking into this one. It would be a disaster if he was the only one who could help. or;bruce gets trapped in the percy jackson universe! shenanigans ensue
